USB_AUTOPLAY.PLUGIN_DESCRIPTION: Automatically play music from a USB stick on boot or when inserted.
USB_AUTOPLAY.USB_PATH_DESCRIPTION: Default: USB. Use USB/folder_name to restrict playback to a specific folder.
USB_AUTOPLAY.FORCE_PLAYBACK_DESCRIPTION: Stops current playback and starts USB playback when USB content is detected.
USB_AUTOPLAY.POLL_INTERVAL_DESCRIPTION: How often the plugin checks for USB content.
